# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - pre-build
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  BUILD_SCRIPT: "build.sh"
  TEST_SCRIPT: "test.sh"
  DEPLOY_SCRIPT: "deploy.sh"
  SCRIPTS_DIR: "ci-scripts"
  CUSTOM_IMAGE: "ubuntu:latest"
  BUILD_ARGS: ""
  TEST_ARGS: ""
  DEPLOY_ARGS: ""
  ENABLE_PRE_BUILD: "false"
  ENABLE_TEST: "true"
  ENABLE_DEPLOY: "false"

default:
  image: $CUSTOM_IMAGE
  tags:
    - shared
  before_script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${SCRIPTS_DIR}/setup.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running setup script..."
        chmod +x "${SCRIPTS_DIR}/setup.sh"
        ./${SCRIPTS_DIR}/setup.sh
      fi
    - |
      if [ -f "requirements.txt" ]; then
        echo "Detected Python project, installing dependencies..."
        pip install -r requirements.txt 2>/dev/null || true
      fi
    - |
      if [ -f "package.json" ]; then
        echo "Detected Node.js project, installing dependencies..."
        npm install 2>/dev/null || true
      fi
    - |
      if [ -f "Gemfile" ]; then
        echo "Detected Ruby project, installing dependencies..."
        bundle install 2>/dev/null || true
      fi
    - |
      if [ -f "go.mod" ]; then
        echo "Detected Go project, downloading modules..."
        go mod download 2>/dev/null || true
      fi

pre-build:
  stage: pre-build
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_PRE_BUILD == "true"'
      when: always
    - if: '$ENABLE_PRE_BUILD != "true"'
      when: never
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${SCRIPTS_DIR}/pre-build.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing pre-build script..."
        chmod +x "${SCRIPTS_DIR}/pre-build.sh"
        ./${SCRIPTS_DIR}/pre-build.sh
      else
        echo "No pre-build script found at ${SCRIPTS_DIR}/pre-build.sh, skipping."
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
      - dist/
      - output/
    expire_in: 1 hour
    when: always

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - |
      SCRIPT_PATH="${SCRIPTS_DIR}/${BUILD_SCRIPT}"
      if [ -f "$SCRIPT_PATH" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom build script: $SCRIPT_PATH"
        chmod +x "$SCRIPT_PATH"
        ./$SCRIPT_PATH $BUILD_ARGS
      elif [ -f "Makefile" ]; then
        echo "No custom build script found. Detected Makefile, running make..."
        make build $BUILD_ARGS || make all $BUILD_ARGS || make $BUILD_ARGS
      elif [ -f "build.gradle" ] || [ -f "build.gradle.kts" ]; then
        echo "Detected Gradle project, running gradle build..."
        ./gradlew build $BUILD_ARGS 2>/dev/null || gradle build $BUILD_ARGS
      elif [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
        echo "Detected Maven project, running mvn package..."
        mvn package $BUILD_ARGS -B
      elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
        echo "Detected Node.js project, running npm build..."
        npm run build $BUILD_ARGS
      elif [ -f "setup.py" ] || [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
        echo "Detected Python project, running build..."
        python -m build $BUILD_ARGS 2>/dev/null || python setup.py build $BUILD_ARGS
      elif [ -f "Cargo.toml" ]; then
        echo "Detected Rust project, running cargo build..."
        cargo build --release $BUILD_ARGS
      elif [ -f "CMakeLists.txt" ]; then
        echo "Detected CMake project..."
        mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. && make $BUILD_ARGS
      else
        echo "ERROR: No build script found at $SCRIPT_PATH and no recognized build system detected."
        echo "Please create a build script at ${SCRIPTS_DIR}/${BUILD_SCRIPT}"
        exit 1
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
      - dist/
      - output/
      - target/
      - bin/
      - "*.jar"
      - "*.war"
      - "*.whl"
      - "*.tar.gz"
    expire_in: 1 week
    when: on_success

test:
  stage: test
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_TEST == "true"'
      when: always
    - if: '$ENABLE_TEST != "true"'
      when: never
  dependencies:
    - build
  script:
    - |
      SCRIPT_PATH="${SCRIPTS_DIR}/${TEST_SCRIPT}"
      if [ -f "$SCRIPT_PATH" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom test script: $SCRIPT_PATH"
        chmod +x "$SCRIPT_PATH"
        ./$SCRIPT_PATH $TEST_ARGS
      elif [ -f "Makefile" ] && grep -q "test" Makefile; then
        echo "Running make test..."
        make test $TEST_ARGS
      elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
        echo "Running npm test..."
        npm test $TEST_ARGS
      elif [ -f "build.gradle" ] || [ -f "build.gradle.kts" ]; then
        echo "Running gradle test..."
        ./gradlew test $TEST_ARGS 2>/dev/null || gradle test $TEST_ARGS
      elif [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
        echo "Running mvn test..."
        mvn test $TEST_ARGS -B
      elif [ -f "setup.py" ] || [ -f "pyproject.toml" ] || [ -f "tox.ini" ]; then
        echo "Running Python tests..."
        python -m pytest $TEST_ARGS 2>/dev/null || python -m unittest discover $TEST_ARGS
      elif [ -f "Cargo.toml" ]; then
        echo "Running cargo test..."
        cargo test $TEST_ARGS
      elif [ -f "go.mod" ]; then
        echo "Running go test..."
        go test ./... $TEST_ARGS
      else
        echo "WARNING: No test script found at $SCRIPT_PATH and no recognized test framework detected."
        echo "Skipping tests. Create a test script at ${SCRIPTS_DIR}/${TEST_SCRIPT} to enable testing."
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - test-results/
      - coverage/
      - "*.xml"
    reports:
      junit:
        - test-results/**/*.xml
        - "**/TEST-*.xml"
        - "**/surefire-reports/*.xml"
      coverage_report:
        coverage_format: cobertura
        path: coverage/cobertura-coverage.xml
    expire_in: 30 days
    when: always

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_DEPLOY == "true" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: manual
    - if: '$ENABLE_DEPLOY == "true" && $CI_COMMIT_TAG'
      when: manual
    - when: never
  dependencies:
    - build
    - test
  environment:
    name: $CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG
    url: $DEPLOY_URL
  script:
    - |
      SCRIPT_PATH="${SCRIPTS_DIR}/${DEPLOY_SCRIPT}"
      if [ -f "$SCRIPT_PATH" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom deploy script: $SCRIPT_PATH"
        chmod +x "$SCRIPT_PATH"
        ./$SCRIPT_PATH $DEPLOY_ARGS
      else
        echo "ERROR: No deploy script found at $SCRIPT_PATH"
        echo "Please create a deploy script at ${SCRIPTS_DIR}/${DEPLOY_SCRIPT}"
        exit 1
      fi
